text:
Additionally, beginning in CY 2024 
and each subsequent year, claims for the separate payment amount of an 
applicable dNPWT device would now be accepted and processed on 
claims submitted using the type of bill that is most commonly used by 
home health agencies to bill services under a home health plan of care 
(TOB 032x). That is, claims with a date of service on or after January 1, 
2024 for an applicable dNPWT device will no longer be submitted on 
TOB 034x.

A patient requires
